items.title: Sources: Alibaba-backed PixVerse, which develops AI video generation tools, raised a $300M Series C led by CDH; the company says the round values it at $1B+ (Olivia Poh/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Sources: Alibaba-backed PixVerse, which develops AI video generation tools, raised a $300M Series C led by CDH; the company says the round values it at $1B+ (Olivia Poh/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：阿里巴巴支持的 PixVerse，一家开发人工智能视频生成工具的公司，筹集了由 CDH 领投的 3 亿美元 C 轮融资；该公司表示，本轮融资估值为 10 亿美元以上（Olivia Poh/彭博社）
